creator: comet.berkeley@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 158147
editors/the shar file

I wish to resurrect the Hessling Editor, editors/the, which was removed from the ports tree in April 2014.

This editor is still in development (version 3.3RC3) and uses rexx as it's scripting language.

http://hessling-editor.sourceforge.net/

While re-writing the Makefile I discovered that there are two packages that appear to be identical, devel/pdcurses and devel/pdcurses-the.

The pdcurses-the package is no longer needed as both packages are now the same.

The new editors/the package now defaults to use rexx-regina and ncurses.
